taskResults.title: Implement database models and migrations for user data and feed system
Create API contracts and frontend client for authentication and user data
Setup Docker Compose and environment configuration
Build external API clients for news sources and market venues
Implement Feed aggregation 10-step orchestration pipeline
Add Feed REST and SSE streaming routes
Implement Markets scanner 11-step pipeline and API routes
Implement authentication and user management API endpoints
Create app shell and navigation layout with authentication routing
Implement Landing page with Privy authentication modal
Build Onboarding Interest selection page
Build Style Assessment quiz with 6 questions and scoring
Implement Feed page with infinite scroll and live aggregation
Build Markets scanner page with input handling and live results
Create Profile page with identity display and edit entry points
Build Settings page for interest editing with validation
Document chip click behavior and implement interaction logic
Add universal market data disclaimer footer to all relevant pages
Set up Playwright E2E harness
Implement PRD browser journeys

suggestions: Reduce context loss: improve section selection / budget allocation so critical PRD and implementation context is not truncated.
Tighten task-to-file planning: the worker should either write the planned files or immediately repair the missing file-plan deltas.
Improve final integration convergence: prioritize the highest-signal failing gate first and keep stagnation detection enabled to avoid read-only loops.
Optimize model spend: reduce repeated high-cost iterations by improving preflight checks, duplicate-file cleanup, and stricter early gates.
